TH_SANAE-DRAW.description:
Cards with this keyword have their base values changed when drawn, based on the fortune drawn.
[gold]Great Luck[/gold]: Double the values
[green]Luck[/green]: No change
[red]Bad Luck[/gold]: Halve the values
[purple]Great Curse[/purple]: Values become 0
TH_SANAE-DRAW.title: Fortune Draw
TH_SANAE-DRAW_GREAT_LUCK.title: Fortune Draw · Great Luck
TH_SANAE-DRAW_LUCK.title: Fortune Draw · Luck
TH_SANAE-DRAW_BAD_LUCK.title: Fortune Draw · Bad Luck
TH_SANAE-DRAW_GREAT_CURSE.title: Fortune Draw · Great Curse
TH_SANAE-WIND_STEP.description: Cards with this keyword can only be played while you are in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_STEP.title: Wind Step
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE.description: Cards with this keyword have a chance to grant Energy equal to their base cost when drawn.
TH_SANAE-MIRACLE.title: Miracle
